book_of_ascension.description: Book on ascending the self. Grants the ability to improve at tasks through practice.
book_of_ascension.name: Book of Ascension

book_of_craftsmanship.description: Ancient tome of a master craftsman. Reveals subtle hints about crafting items and constructing buildings.
book_of_craftsmanship.name: Book of Craftsmanship

book_of_trials.description: Book about navigating life’s challenges. Unlocks rewards for those who prove themselves through achievements.
book_of_trials.name: Book of Trials

book_of_war.description: Book containing wisdom about combat. Reveals the likelihood of success in battles and encounters.
book_of_war.name: Book of War

alphas_hide.description: Hide of the wolf pack leader, imbued with primal power
alphas_hide.name: Alpha's Hide

ancient_scrolls.description: Mysterious scrolls written in an unknown language, waiting to be decrypted
ancient_scrolls.name: Ancient Scrolls

arbalest_schematic.description: Blueprint for crafting a powerful crossbow
arbalest_schematic.name: Arbalest

ashen_embrace.description: Your ability to mine is improved
ashen_embrace.name: Ashen Embrace

ashen_embrace_enhanced.description: Your ability to mine is greatly improved
ashen_embrace_enhanced.name: Deep Ashen Embrace

bell_blessing.description: A mysterious bell mark on your forearm. Doubles Focus Points gained during Sleep.
bell_blessing.name: Bell Blessing

black_bear_fur.description: Cursed black fur from an otherworldy giant bear
black_bear_fur.name: Black Bear Fur

black_wood.description: A slab of dense, light-drinking timber from the sanctuary tree.

blackened_mirror.description: Tall cracked mirror framed in black iron that radiates cold aura
blackened_mirror.name: Blackened Mirror

blacksteel_armor.description: Heavy armor adorned with deadly spikes
blacksteel_armor.name: Blacksteel Armor

blood_baptized.description: Received after bathing in the blood of powerful creatures
blood_baptized.name: Blood Baptized

bloodstained_belt.description: Leather belt stained with old blood
bloodstained_belt.name: Bloodstained Belt

bloodstone.description: Crimson gem pulsing with dark energy
bloodstone.name: Bloodstone

bone_devourer_blood.description: A vial of pale blood harvested from the Bone Devourer. Its effects are unknown.
bone_devourer_blood.name: Devourer Blood

bone_dice.description: Dice carved from bones, polished to a soft, unsettling smoothness. Grants one extra game at the Gambler.
bone_dice.name: Bone Dice

bone_necklace.name: Bone Necklace

chitin_plates.description: Powerful chitin plates from giant swamp creatures. Can be used to add Chitin Plating to fortifications.
chitin_plates.name: Chitin Plates

cracked_crown.description: Ancient golden crown radiating with mysterious power
cracked_crown.name: Cracked Crown

dagons_gift.description: Your ability to hunt is improved

dagons_gift_enhanced.description: Your ability to hunt is greatly improved
dagons_gift_enhanced.name: Dagon's Great Gift

devourer_crown.description: Crown of the Bone Devourer, made from bones
devourer_crown.name: Devourer Crown

ebon_grace.description: Dark blessing received by the black tree. Doubling production bonus from Heartfire.
ebon_grace.name: Ebon Grace

ebony_ring.description: Dark ring left as a gift by the forest gods
ebony_ring.name: Ebony Ring

explorer_pack.description: Well-crafted leather backpack easing the weight upon the shoulders
explorer_pack.name: Explorer Backpack

feeding_ring.description: Ring that appeared one morning, seemingly fused to your finger
feeding_ring.name: Feeding Ring

fishers_hand.description: Ancient techniques of the shore fishermen to build fish traps
fishers_hand.name: Fisher's Hand

forests_grace.description: The deers of the forest seem to notice you less

gifted_ring.description: Plain ring someone left for you to find

grenadier_bag.description: Reinforced leather bag for carrying more explosives

highpriest_robe.description: Sacred robe adorned with gold thread
highpriest_robe.name: Highpriest Robe

hollow_king_scepter.name: Hollow King Scepter

hunter_cloak.description: Supple leather cloak that silences every movement

knights_burden.description: Knowledge the knight shared with you, weighing heavily on your mind

loggers_gloves.name: Logger's Gloves

lycan_blood.description: A vial of thick blood from a Lycanthrope alpha. Its effects are unknown.
lycan_blood.name: Lycan Blood

map_fragment.description: Fragments of a map leading to an unknown place.

moon_bracelet.description: Fine weightless bracelet of enduring white stone
moon_bracelet.name: Moon Bracelet

necromancer_blood.description: A vial of dark blood harvested from a Necromancer. Its effects are unknown.
necromancer_blood.name: Necromancer Blood

stormglass_halberd_schematic.name: Stormglass Halberd

survivors_last_words.description: The final blessing from a dying stranger
